country.desc_zh: 阿根廷是南美洲第二大国，以大草原（潘帕斯）、巴塔哥尼亚高原、伊瓜苏瀑布和浓郁的探戈文化著称。布宜诺斯艾利斯是南美洲最繁华的城市之一，被誉为「南美的巴黎」。阿根廷拥有丰富的自然资源和独特的欧洲移民文化底蕴，是南美洲最具欧洲气质的国家之一。
country.desc_en: Argentina is South America's second-largest country, celebrated for its pampas grasslands, Patagonian highlands, Iguazu Falls, and vibrant tango culture. Buenos Aires — the 「Paris of South America」 — is one of the continent's most cosmopolitan cities. Argentina blends abundant natural resources with a rich European immigrant heritage, making it South America's most distinctly European-influenced nation.
country.football_desc_zh: 阿根廷是世界足球最成功的国家之一，三届世界杯冠军（1978、1986、2022年），以独特的进攻激情和「Garra」精神著称。从马拉多纳到梅西，阿根廷产出了两位被誉为「史上最伟大球员」的人物。2022年卡塔尔世界杯，在梅西的带领下，结束了长达36年的冠军等待，令全阿根廷和全世界的球迷沸腾。2026年以卫冕冠军身份出征，是夺冠最热门的球队之一。
country.football_desc_en: Argentina are one of world football's greatest nations — three-time World Cup champions (1978, 1986, 2022) with a tradition of attacking brilliance and the 「Garra」 fighting spirit. From Maradona to Messi, Argentina have produced the two most debated candidates for football's greatest player of all time. The 2022 Qatar World Cup triumph — ending a 36-year wait — under Messi's leadership is the defining sporting moment of Argentina's modern era. As reigning world champions, they arrive at 2026 as one of the tournament's most feared sides.

legends.name: Diego Maradona
legends.bio_zh: 被无数人视为「史上最伟大的球员」，1986年世界杯是他职业生涯的永恒巅峰。对英格兰的「上帝之手」和「世纪进球」在同一场比赛中出现，成为足球史上最神奇的故事。以超凡入圣的盘带技术、无与伦比的创造力和在逆境中爆发的天才称霸1980年代世界足坛。在那不勒斯期间率球队赢得两次意甲冠军，是那不勒斯永恒的神灵。
legends.bio_en: Considered by many the greatest footballer of all time. The 1986 World Cup is his immortal peak — the 「Hand of God」 and the 「Goal of the Century」 in the same match against England remain the most mythologised moments in football history. His supernatural dribbling, creativity, and genius under pressure dominated 1980s football. At Napoli he delivered two Serie A titles and remains the city's eternal deity.
legends.stat_zh: 91出场次数34球，1986年世界杯冠军队长，「世纪进球」创造者
legends.stat_en: 91 caps, 34 goals; captained 1986 World Cup triumph; scored the 「Goal of the Century」

legends.name: Lionel Messi
legends.bio_zh: 与马拉多纳并称「史上最伟大球员」的人，八届金球奖得主（历史第一），在巴塞罗那赢得4次欧冠、10次西甲和无数个人荣誉。2022年卡塔尔世界杯，以35岁高龄率阿根廷夺冠，完成了足球历史上最伟大的圆梦时刻之一——他在决赛中打入两球、助攻一球，又在点球大战中首个挺身罚进，将世界杯金杯高高举起。2026年是否参赛仍充满悬念，但他的每次出场都可能是最后的谢幕。
legends.bio_en: Shares with Maradona the claim to the greatest footballer of all time — eight Ballon d'Or titles, four Champions Leagues and 10 La Ligas with Barcelona. The 2022 World Cup triumph in Qatar — at age 35 — is the defining moment of his career and one of football's greatest stories: two goals, one assist, and the decisive penalty in the shootout. Whether he plays in 2026 remains uncertain, but every Messi appearance could be his last on the world stage.
legends.stat_zh: 188出场次数112球（历史最多），八届金球奖，2022年世界杯最佳球员
legends.stat_en: 188 caps, 112 international goals (world record); 8 Ballon d'Or; 2022 World Cup winner and Best Player

legends.name: Gabriel Batistuta
legends.bio_zh: 「巴蒂斯托」——阿根廷足球史上最凶猛的中锋，职业生涯代表阿根廷打入54球（当时的阿根廷历史纪录）。以其近乎完美的中锋技术组合著称——头球、双脚射门、力量、速度、跑位无一不精。在佛罗伦萨效力11年，是球迷膜拜的传奇英雄，也是世界杯历史上最具统治力的中锋之一。
legends.bio_en: 「Batigol」 — Argentina's most ferocious striker, with 54 international goals (the Argentine record until Messi surpassed it). Possessed a near-perfect combination of centre-forward qualities: headers, shooting with both feet, power, pace, and positioning. After 11 years at Fiorentina where he became a living legend, Batistuta remains one of the most complete strikers in World Cup history.
legends.stat_zh: 78出场次数54球，阿根廷历史射手榜第二（梅西破纪录前为第一）
legends.stat_en: 78 caps, 54 goals; Argentina's record scorer until Messi; one of the WC's most complete strikers

legends.name: Emiliano Martínez
legends.bio_zh: 「蜘蛛侠」——2022年世界杯的英雄门将，在整届赛事中做出了多次关键扑救，点球大战中扑出法国的关键一击，帮助阿根廷夺冠。以超强的反应速度、心理战术和无所畏惧的大心脏著称，是当今世界最顶级的门将之一，阿斯顿维拉的绝对核心，2022年世界杯最佳门将奖获得者。
legends.bio_en: 「Dibu」 — the hero of the 2022 World Cup final. His penalty save in the shootout against France was the moment that sealed Argentina's title. Known for extraordinary reflexes, psychological intensity, and fearless big-game presence. Named Best Goalkeeper at the 2022 World Cup, he is considered one of the finest shot-stoppers in the world and the cornerstone of Aston Villa's defence.
legends.stat_zh: 52出场次数，2022年世界杯最佳门将，决赛点球关键扑救
legends.stat_en: 52 caps; 2022 World Cup Best Goalkeeper; made the decisive penalty save in the final

rivalries.desc_zh: 「超级经典」——世界上最伟大的国际足球德比，南美洲两大足球超级大国之间的历史宿敌。两国均拥有世界杯最多的冠军次数（巴西5次、阿根廷3次），每次对阵都是南美洲乃至全球球迷的节日。梅西vs内马尔时代赋予这段宿敌关系更多个人色彩，两国球迷之间的争论永无止境。
rivalries.desc_en: The 「Superclásico」 — the greatest international football rivalry in the world. South America's two supreme footballing powers, between them holding eight World Cup titles (Brazil 5, Argentina 3). Every meeting is a continental event, watched by hundreds of millions. The Messi vs Neymar era added personal rivalry to the historical contest. The debate between Argentine and Brazilian fans over which nation is 「better」 is football's most passionate ongoing argument.

rivalries.desc_zh: 「马岛战争」的延伸——1982年英阿战争之后，两国的足球对决被赋予了深厚的政治含义。1986年世界杯，马拉多纳的「上帝之手」和「世纪进球」定义了这段宿敌关系。此后两国在多届世界杯的碰面均充满戏剧性，是现代足球史上最具历史背景的对决之一。
rivalries.desc_en: A rivalry layered with political history following the 1982 Falklands War. Maradona's 「Hand of God」 and 「Goal of the Century」 against England at the 1986 World Cup — in the same match — defined this rivalry for generations. Subsequent World Cup meetings have maintained the dramatic intensity, making Argentina vs England one of football's most historically loaded fixtures.

fun_facts.text_zh: 阿根廷是少数在世界杯历史上全时段都有冠军的南美球队，1978（主场）、1986（马拉多纳时代）和2022（梅西时代）三次夺冠跨越三个不同的历史时期，每一次都代表了一代阿根廷球迷最珍贵的集体记忆。
fun_facts.text_en: Argentina's three World Cup titles span three distinct eras: 1978 (on home soil), 1986 (the Maradona era), and 2022 (the Messi era). Each represents the defining sporting moment for a different generation of Argentine fans — a breadth of success across football history matched by very few nations.

fun_facts.text_zh: 1986年世界杯，马拉多纳在对英格兰的比赛中用左手将球打入网中，裁判误判进球有效——这就是著名的「上帝之手」。四分钟后，他又从自己半场开始带球突破六名英格兰球员，打入「世纪进球」。在同一场比赛、相隔四分钟内，足球史上最具争议的进球和最伟大的进球相继出现。
fun_facts.text_en: At the 1986 World Cup, Maradona punched the ball into the net against England — later claiming it was scored with 「the Hand of God」 — then four minutes later scored the 「Goal of the Century,」 dribbling past six English players from his own half. Two of football's most famous goals in the same match, four minutes apart — the defining chapter of the game's mythology.

fun_facts.text_zh: 2022年世界杯决赛，阿根廷2-0领先法国，即将夺冠，却在最后10分钟内被姆巴佩连入两球扳平，加时赛又一度3-3——是任何团队球迷都不敢相信的逆转剧情。最终阿根廷凭点球4-2胜出，梅西等球员泪洒球场，是近现代体育史上最戏剧性的冠军诞生时刻之一。
fun_facts.text_en: The 2022 World Cup final went from Argentina leading 2-0 and seemingly certain champions, to Mbappé's stunning brace levelling it in the final 10 minutes, to a 3-3 draw in extra time, to a penalty shootout — one of the most breathtaking swings of fortune in sporting history. Argentina winning 4-2 on penalties made it simultaneously the greatest World Cup final ever and Messi's greatest sporting moment.

fun_facts.text_zh: 梅西以188场国际比赛出场（持续增加）和112粒国际进球双双居世界第一，是有史以来进球最多的国际球员。以一支南美球队的球员身份做到这一点尤为难得，因为南美球队的国际赛日机会相对少于欧洲球队。
fun_facts.text_en: Messi's 112 international goals (and counting) make him the highest-scoring men's international footballer of all time — surpassing Cristiano Ronaldo and Ali Daei. Achieving this as a South American player, where international match opportunities are fewer than in Europe, makes the record even more extraordinary.
